IRECEIVED THE WARNING THAT "PRE-COLLISION SYSTEM MALFUNCTION" WHILE I WAS DRIVING ON THE HIGHWAY THIS MORNING. THE WARNING MESSAGE ASKED ME TO STOP THE CAR AT A SAFE PLACE AND VISIT THE DEALER. AS SOON AS I GOT OFF THE HIGHWAY, THE CAR STOPPED ITSELF, AND THE STEERING WAS LOCKED.

narrative.headline: What 2018 Toyota Prius C owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 6 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (17% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
